MSC SETTING REVIEW CONTINUED

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INSURANCE BAD FAITH IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN BY PRODUCING FACIE EVIDENCE THAT THOROUGHLY AND FAIRLY INVESTIGATED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, AND DID NOT CONSCIOUSLY OR DELIBERATELY ACT IN A MANNER TO FRUSTRATE OR DEPRIVE PLAINTIFF OF THE BENEFITS OF THE AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)
